headlines.title: House votes to rebuke Trump over war with Iran
headlines.description: The House offered a rare rebuke to President Donald Trump, passing a Democratic-led measure to end his war with Iran over objections from Republican leadership.

headlines.title: Federal judges say elected officials are eroding confidence in judicial system
headlines.description: Elected officials are eroding confidence in the judicial system, and the vitriol increasingly espoused by politicians angry over court rulings can have dangerous implications, two federal judges told NBC News.

headlines.title: Trump says he’s not sure if ‘anti-weaponization’ fund is really dead: ‘I’d have to ask the lawyers’
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said Tuesday the Justice Department was “not moving forward” with the $1.8 billion fund.

headlines.title: New intel chief is a partisan warrior who has the president’s ear, sources say
headlines.description: Former officers worry Bill Pulte could use intelligence to target political opponents or justify federal oversight of elections.

headlines.title: New attacks by Iran and U.S. strain an already shaky ceasefire
headlines.description: An Iran drone attack on Kuwait’s main airport killed one and injured dozens more. Still, late today President Trump dismissed the latest violence and said a longer term peace deal could be reached this weekend. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports from the region.

headlines.title: Judges call out rising acts of violence against the judiciary, slam Trump's 'irresponsible rhetoric'
headlines.description: Six years ago, Federal Judge Esther Salas’ son was killed by a man targeting her. NBC News Legal Affairs reporter Gary Grumbach joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss his Common Ground conversation with Salas and Judge John Jones III as they warn more lives are at risk.

headlines.title: Steve Kornacki breaks down California's ‘cliffhanger’ and the first Trump-backed candidate loss
headlines.description: NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press NOW to break down the results of primary races across the nation and what Californians can expect on the ballot in the general election come November. KNBC-TV Political Reporter Conan Nolan analyzes the Los Angeles mayoral race.

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz faces backlash for running in a Florida district long represented by Black Democrats
headlines.description: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz faces pushback from Black Democrats after she decided to run in a newly redrawn district that has a plurality of Black voters and a crowded primary field.

headlines.title: Senate Republicans move forward with their big immigration bill after internal clashes: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Sahil Kapur previews the road ahead for congressional Republicans’ next reconciliation bill.

headlines.title: GOP businessman Toby Doeden advances to runoff in South Dakota governor’s race
headlines.description: South Dakota Gov. Larry Rhoden will face businessman Toby Doeden in a GOP primary runoff as he seeks a full term in office, NBC News projects.
